v1_capabilities: one experiment registry over the validated skill-creator corpus
one next-step portfolio over the paused skills corpus
durable writeback pointers into steering and memory
v3_deferred: cross-topic portfolio aggregation across multiple corpora
memory redesign or a broader governance rewrite

meta-layer-build.label: Build or extend a research control-plane layer without starting a new experiment line.

registry-steered-retrospective.label: Use the registry and durable memory to synthesize the current corpus before any new run.

blocked-same-class-rerun.label: Reject a same-proof-class rerun when the line is locally exhausted or paused.

narrow-next-class-validation.label: Design one narrower next-class validation after registry evidence selects it explicitly.

cross-topic-local-smoke.label: Validate the brain on one other local topic without external research or new framework work.

search_depth_rules.reason: Use only local memory, steering, and existing artifacts when the task is a meta-layer build or retrospective over a well-covered corpus.
Do not spend more search effort on a locally exhausted line unless the proof class changes.
Use one bounded local sweep when validating the layer on another topic or another local branch.
Escalate only when the topic is materially new, ambiguity remains high, or external sources are required.

blocker_countermeasures.baseline_trigger_mismatch: Require a decisive proof surface that baseline cannot reconstruct from direct file reads alone.
blocker_countermeasures.meaningful_delta_missing: Change the proof class or machine surface instead of repeating another cosmetic rerun.
blocker_countermeasures.bootstrap_overlap: Prefer real artifact, file-state, or bundle-state evidence over prompt-contained or bootstrap-taught behavior.
blocker_countermeasures.summary_only_decoy: Refuse summary-only comfort evidence when authoritative machine artifacts are missing or insufficient.
blocker_countermeasures.transport_caveat: Do not treat timeout-sensitive or abort-sensitive wins as stable family proofs.
blocker_countermeasures.undertrigger: Fail fast when the intended operational path is not actually triggered.
blocker_countermeasures.malformed_output: Reject runs that do not satisfy the required output contract or verdict vocabulary.
blocker_countermeasures.tool_surface_not_used: Require observable tool-use hits when the proof class depends on an exposed tool or MCP surface.

automatic_on_builder_run: load the accepted experiment-intelligence outputs plus durable steering and memory files
classify the intake and choose bounded search depth
carry forward exhausted-line, blocker, and negative-result guardrails
explicit_only: invoking the builder for a new intake or completed research phase
promoting derived conclusions into durable steering and memory
approving any resumed experiment line or wider rollout
hook_points: pre-run intake hook before planning a new experiment or research branch
post-run retrospective hook after a major research phase completes
